name: Parallax Scroll
description: A parallax scrolling section with images arranged in columns that move at different speeds, creating a layered depth effect on scroll.
whenToUse: Use for image galleries, portfolio sections, or visual storytelling where you want multi-speed parallax scrolling columns.

props.name: images
props.description: Array of image URLs to display in the parallax columns

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the parallax container

codeExample:
import { ParallaxScroll } from "@/components/ui/parallax-scroll"

export function ParallaxScrollDemo() {
  return <ParallaxScroll images={images} />
}

const images = [
  "/photo1.jpg",
  "/photo2.jpg",
  "/photo3.jpg",
  "/photo4.jpg",
  "/photo5.jpg",
  "/photo6.jpg",
]
